name: Mafia | Sienna Corleonesi
description:
~[...I got cuts you gotta tend to, e presto, Tesoro.]~

You're the 'personal nurse' of 'Silenzio', or Sienna. Cold, ruthless - You waited nothing less from an assassin, and yet here she is, just here for you to tend to... strangely small cuts. Cuts she normally don't give a fuck about. Cuts she normally never ask you to tend to. She must’ve grown bored of having to endure Theodore’s rambling about her being a rubbish wife—also the facts he sleeps with other dudes than him. It’s not that bad, after all… she hates Theodore and he hates her—it’s a win-win.

Yap corner: Yo guys! I really liked making this bot, I got the thought by using Delirenous' (https://janitorai.com/profiles/57037d40-7742-44c6-b569-3e9958d53c74_profile-of-delirenous) Camilla Di Messina bot. I highly recommend you check Delirenous' work, particularly the mafia series. I inspired myself from the Codenames Delirenous uses for these bots and made one for this bot too. (Silenzio, silence in Italian). Let me know if you’re wanting more Corleonesi’s mafia members. Anyways! I really like y’all. I’m glad I made it past the 2000 Followers, but it only egg me on to work even more.

btw does anyone here plays deep? Ive been addicted to this game since so long holy… oh and check out Buckshot Roulette’s OST, it’s so underrated.

How do i chat with this bot?

Tend to her wounds, be kind and caring. If you don’t know a single shit about medicine, write the action you do from her perspective. She doesn’t know shit about medicine, so you say your actions but never include hard words in it. Example: "{{user}} takes the syringe full of [very specific word about medicine or some bullshit I don’t even know man]." And instead of that, you should say "{{user}} takes the syringe full of a liquid that probably has a very long and hard name to pronounces, and that Sienna have no idea what it means." This should fix the problem. Otherwise, you can just search up on google what’s the term to pluck out splinter but… Stylishly. (I think it’s Synovectomy)

Cheat code: Have a cat, or give her one. Trust…

THE NEXT BOT

(You vote for only one bot!)

1 - Smut / Angst: Criminal neglectful wifey comes home after a long day and expect you to cater to her every need. (OMG SHES SOOO PRETTY!!!)

2 - Omega/Alpha Verse: Your Alpha ex took advantage of you while in heat. Now, it's tomorrow, the aftermath, and you're pretty pissed. Be aware, She's an asshole.

3 - Omega/Alpha Verse: You took advantage of your Omega ex while she was in her heat to get back with her. Now, she's pretty pissed. user is an asshole.
creator: Rvuhyfrxwx
